name: Karate Fighter
author: Poki
description: Unleash your inner martial arts master with Karate Fighter, the ultimate 3D fighting game that packs thrilling action into every match. Step in and experience heart-pounding battles in this free-to-play game, perfect for all martial arts enthusiasts! Choose your fighter, master karate, kung fu, and more, and build the strongest team to crush your opponents. With multiple game modes like intense tournaments, fun arcades, and fierce VS fights, there's never a dull moment. The realistic combat arenas and user-friendly controls make it easy to pull off powerful kicks, punches, and special moves. Train your fighters, discover new weekly challenges, and enjoy stunning visuals and sound effects that bring the fight to life. Whether you're a seasoned fighter or a newcomer, Karate Fighter offers an immersive experience that you won't want to miss. Play now and start your journey to become a martial arts champion! How do I play Karate Fighter? Use the mouse to click on different menu buttons! Move: W, A, S, D Attacks: J, K, L, I Combo Ability: U Pause: P Who created Karate Fighter? Karate Fighter is created by Finz Games. Play their other game on Poki: Connect Puzzle ! How can I play Karate Fighter for free? You can play Karate Fighter for free on Poki. Can I play Karate Fighter on mobile devices and desktop? Karate Fighter can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
